cross_scene_arcs.title: Proving Competence in a Hostile World
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie confronts systemic sexism and professional skepticism as she fights to assert her authority and integrity in high-stakes negotiations, evolving from a distrusted representative to a morally resolute agent challenging corporate corruption.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Julie is introduced as the Stracks' legal representative but faces immediate distrust due to her gender and perceived inexperience.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Julie directly challenges Strack about a corrupt memo, asserting her ethical stance and resisting pressure to conceal wrongdoing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Julie will expose the corruption or comply with Strack's implicit demand to suppress the evidence remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fractured Relationship with Peyton
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie's emotional journey with Peyton evolves from romantic ambivalence to profound grief, false reunion, and ultimate heartbreak, as she grapples with loss, deception, and the limits of love in the face of irreversible transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton proposes marriage, forcing Julie to confront her reluctance to commit, and she chooses career over relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Julie reaches out to Darkman in love and acceptance, but he rejects reconciliation, declaring their past life irretrievable.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The fundamental incompatibility between Julie's hope for restoration and Darkman's belief in his irreversible descent remains unresolved, leaving their relationship in emotional limbo.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Manipulation: The Strack Entanglement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie's relationship with Louis Strack Jr. shifts from suspicion and hostility to emotional vulnerability and manipulation, culminating in betrayal and mortal peril as she uncovers his role in Peyton's destruction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Strack Jr. falsely believes Julie bribed a steward, turning him into an active antagonist.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Julie is held at the edge of a skyscraper girder by Strack, who intends to kill her as part of his final confrontation with Darkman.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Julie's survival is uncertain as Strack prepares to push her off the girder, with no immediate means of rescue evident.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Awakening and the Pursuit of Truth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie transitions from a professional negotiator to a moral investigator, uncovering corporate corruption and confronting powerful figures, ultimately choosing truth and justice over safety and privilege.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Julie discovers documents indicating corruption in the Von Hoffenstein deal and decides to contact Dale Gorson through Strack's son.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Julie severs ties with Strack after learning he orchestrated the fire that disfigured Peyton, choosing to protect the truth and flee his world.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Strack orders Robert to eliminate both Westlake and Julie, leaving Julie's safety and Peyton's fate in immediate peril.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Trauma to Transformation: Julie's Psychological Journey
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie undergoes a profound psychological transformation, moving from shock and grief over Peyton's death to confronting his return, uncovering the truth of his disfigurement, and ultimately embracing love beyond appearance—only to face rejection and existential isolation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Julie witnesses Peyton's flaming body fall from the sky, left psychologically shattered by the spectacle.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Julie takes Darkman's charred hand in a gesture of love and acceptance, but he rejects her, affirming that he can never return to who he was.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional limbo between Julie's enduring love and Darkman's self-imposed exile remains unresolved, questioning whether connection is possible after irreversible trauma.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Enforcer to Framed Fugitive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pauly transitions from a loyal enforcer in Durant's crew to a man falsely accused of betrayal after Darkman steals his identity and impersonates him in criminal exchanges. His role shifts from perpetrator to victim as he becomes the target of the very organization he served.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pauly is a trusted, if physically strained, member of Durant's crew, using violence to enforce orders.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Pauly is framed, overpowered, and accused of theft and desertion, with no means to prove his innocence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Pauly cannot expose the impersonation or clear his name, leaving him vulnerable to execution by Durant's men.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Stolen Identity and Impersonation Cascade
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Darkman systematically dismantles Pauly's identity by surveilling, replicating, and ultimately impersonating him, using stolen personal effects and forensic mimicry. This arc traces the erosion of Pauly's autonomy as his identity is weaponized against him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pauly unknowingly becomes the subject of Darkman's surveillance during a covert exchange.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Darkman, disguised as Pauly, survives a fall and escapes in daylight, with Pauly's identity now fully compromised and in use.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The real Pauly remains unaware of the impersonation until it's too late, and the consequences of Darkman's actions under his name continue to escalate.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fall and Transformation into a Synthetic Target
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pauly's apparent death through a high-rise fall is revealed to be a survival act under a synthetic disguise, marking a shift from human agent to fugitive under artificial identity. His physical status becomes unstable, bound by time and disguise.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pauly is in freefall from the 23rd floor, presumed dead.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Pauly—actually Darkman in disguise—survives, but his synthetic skin begins to melt, revealing the fragility of his new existence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The 98-minute time limit on the disguise creates urgent pressure, and the real Pauly's fate remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Theft That Ignites Retribution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pauly's secret theft of 'the coney' is revealed as the catalyst for Durant's personal vendetta, reframing his earlier framing as both consequence and escalation. His goal shifts from survival to evading a targeted manhunt.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pauly is falsely accused of stealing money and planning to flee.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: It is revealed he actually stole a valuable object ('the coney'), justifying Durant's extreme retaliation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The true nature and value of 'the coney' remains unknown, as does whether Pauly intended to betray Durant or was acting under duress.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fate of the Real Pauly
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The arc traces the ambiguous and tragic trajectory of the real Pauly—from being framed and attacked, to presumed dead in a fall, then later revealed as a victim whose face has been harvested. It blends identity, survival, and horror into a downward spiral.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pauly is physically overpowered and accused in his own bedroom.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His face is found preserved in a warehouse, confirming his death or capture by the antagonist.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The circumstances of Pauly's capture, whether he survived the fall, and how his face was taken remain unexplained, leaving his final moments shrouded in mystery.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fragile Breakthrough
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton pursues the scientific goal of achieving stable synthetic tissue for facial regeneration, progressing from initial success in imaging and replication to confronting the persistent 99-minute cellular degradation barrier, culminating in a hard-won breakthrough at 100 minutes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Digital systems work, but synthetic skin degrades at 98 minutes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cellular viability reaches 100 minutes, marking a critical milestone.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The root cause of molecular instability remains unknown, threatening long-term viability.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love Deferred, Then Lost
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton's evolving romantic relationship with Julie moves from hesitant intention to intimate connection, abrupt rejection, failed reconciliation attempts, and ultimately tragic separation as his transformation renders him unrecognizable and emotionally unreachable.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton intends to propose but has delayed repeatedly.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peyton rejects Julie's love, accepting his life as Darkman and severing their bond permanently.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Julie's love persists, but Peyton's disfigurement and identity loss make mutual reconnection impossible.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Scientist to Survivor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton undergoes a catastrophic fall from respected scientist to presumed-dead victim, surviving extreme trauma and beginning a physical transformation that strips him of identity, mobility, and sensation, marking the end of his former life and the birth of a new existence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton is a leading researcher with control over his work and life.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He is unidentified, immobilized, and neurologically altered in a burn unit, beginning a post-human transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His psychological state and capacity for recovery or vengeance remain unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Mask of Normalcy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton struggles to reintegrate into human society and reclaim his past identity, torn between the desire to be recognized and loved and the fear of rejection due to his disfigurement, leading to escalating internal and external conflicts that erode his emotional stability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton seeks recognition from Julie but is met with horror.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His suppressed rage erupts violently, destroying any chance of normal intimacy and accelerating his transformation into Darkman.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His need for acceptance clashes with his irreversible physical and psychological changes, making reconciliation impossible.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Reckoning and Release
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton, now fully transformed, becomes the unseen force driving the final confrontation—sabotaging enemies, drawing Julie into danger, and ultimately choosing self-erasure over reunion, completing his arc from man to myth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton is hidden but active, manipulating events from the shadows.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He reveals himself to Julie, accepts her love, then rejects it, stepping into permanent isolation as Darkman.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Julie's hope for restoration remains unfulfilled, underscoring the tragedy of Peyton's irreversible transformation.
